title: Create partner ecosystem packet from API Hub and portal evidence
given: A demo operator has API Hub view/edit access and supplier or CRM partner view access.
API Hub connectors, staging batches, mapping jobs, assistant review items, suppliers, and CRM accounts exist.
Some partners have portal-linked users while others are missing launch scope.
when: The operator selects Create partner packet.
then: The assistant persists an AssistantPartnerEcosystemPacket row.
The packet includes connector readiness, partner-scope gaps, mapping review, onboarding plan, and launch checklist.
No connector is activated, no staging rows are applied, no portal scope changes, and no partner playbooks are launched automatically.

title: Queue partner launch review with approval note
given: A partner ecosystem packet exists with connector blockers or mapping review items.
The operator has API Hub edit access.
when: The operator adds a launch approval note.
then: An AssistantActionQueueItem is created for partner ecosystem launch review.
The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED and stores the approval note.
The audit event states connectors, staging rows, portal scopes, and partner playbooks were not launched automatically.

title: Permission scoped marketplace readiness
given: A user lacks API Hub access or lacks supplier/CRM partner evidence access.
Another user has the required grants.
when: The permitted user reviews the live launch preview.
then: The unpermitted user receives access denied.
The permitted user sees only evidence from allowed API Hub and partner domains.
Launch checklist explicitly requires human approval before external partner workflows are enabled.
